**Total issues opened: 9**

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(defn create-verify-issue [pr]
  (let [title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))]
    (github__create_issue {:repo "acme/web" :title title})))
(def results (doall (map create-verify-issue prs-with-linear)))
(count results)
(map :number results)"}
